intro: Paraprasophyllum pruinosum is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing oxidative stress and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Paraprasophyllum pruinosum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
